final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 mirrorless camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a "detailed technical exploded-view" aesthetic — references in the spirit of mid-century technical manual illustration (Haynes Manuals tradition), Braun product engineering diagrams, 1980s Japanese electronics assembly schematics; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all parts spatially separated and connected by alignment guides or dotted lines to their assembled positions
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera body and all major components clearly separated, including but not limited to: lens mount, sensor, shutter mechanism, body shell (front and rear), grip, viewfinder unit, LCD screen, battery compartment, card slot cover, control dials, buttons, hot shoe, internal circuit board, image stabilization unit, mirror box area, and port covers
Scene/backdrop: clean white or neutral background to maximize part legibility
Lighting/mood: needs a flat, clinical technical-illustration mood — exact rendering approach is yours
Color palette: needs a neutral, technical palette with subtle part differentiation — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include each component's name label in Spanish (e.g. "montura de objetivo", "sensor", "obturador", "pantalla LCD", "visor", "batería", "ranura para tarjeta", "zapata de flash", "placa de circuito", "dial de control", "carcasa delantera", "carcasa trasera", "empuñadura")
Constraints: must preserve accurate Sony A7 body silhouette and proportional part relationships; all parts must be individually labeled
Avoid: assembled closed-body view; missing labels; decorative non-technical backgrounds
